creator: mauricio@arareko.net
text:
A couple of questions to the submitter:

1) Why is MySQL & PostgreSQL support being removed? Has these been deprecated from BioRuby?

2) Please modify the OPTIONSFILE value to the following:

OPTIONSFILE=    ${PORT_DBDIR}/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}/options

To both the submitter and Edwin:


1) Does the OPTIONS directives work fine for you? I'm not able to build any of the selected options even if I check the boxes in the options screen. If I edit the Makefile and turn them ON, then they are built, but then if I uncheck the boxes in the options screen the port still requires/builds them. Seems like a bug in the lower-level Makefiles? Any ideas on that Edwin??

Regards,
Mauricio.




----- Original Message ----
From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: mauricio@arareko.net
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Sent: Thursday, March 5, 2009 6:30:20 AM
Subject: Re: ports/132333: Update port: biology/ruby-bio to 1.3.0

Maintainer of biology/ruby-bio,

Please note that PR ports/132333 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132333

Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
